BridalClass2-8ED_86.english: It's not 'I want to be behind'... 'I want to die' is a refined word. Will you make your wish come true?
BridalClass2-8ED_86.korean: '뒤지고 싶어'가 아니라… '죽고 싶어'가 순화된 말이야. 소원 실현 시켜줄까?

BridalClass2-8ED_88.english: …Lise took out the scissors from her back and cut the table in one stroke.
BridalClass2-8ED_88.korean:
- 사디어스가 헛기침을 하자, 그제야 셋은 뒤를 돌아보았다.
나는 어색한 상황을 바꾸기 위해 세 학생들을 다독였다.

BridalClass2-8ED_89.english:
"Even if Lise is a little scared, how cultured he is...
You guys will definitely be of great help too."
BridalClass2-8ED_89.korean:
리제가 조금 무서워도 얼마나 교양 있는데...
너희들도 분명 큰 도움이 될 거야.

BridalClass2-8ED_9.english: Buddy~ what's wrong? Eating and then going to the sauna is something anyone can do~?
BridalClass2-8ED_9.korean: 버디~ 왜 그래? 밥 먹고 사우나 가는 것 정도는 누구나 하는 거잖아~?

BridalClass2-8ED_90.english: Children are a mirror of their parents... Ahaha…

BridalClass2-8ED_92.english: Master. I'm sorry. I lost my composure for a moment…

BridalClass2-8ED_93.english: No, Lise. It's nice to see that you've grown enough to teach someone else now.
BridalClass2-8ED_93.korean: 아냐 리제. 이젠 다른 사람을 가르쳐 줄 정도로 성장한 모습이 보기 좋아.

BridalClass2-8ED_94.english:
"I... Really, Master? Hehe... Lord, master... So...
Lise said that she is the best teacher in the bridal class... Hehehe... Please praise me..."
BridalClass2-8ED_94.korean:
저… 정말인가요 주인님? 에헤헤… 주, 주인님… 그러니까…
리제가 신부수업을 하는 선생님 중 가장 뛰어나다고… 헤헤헤… 칭찬해 주세요…

BridalClass2-8ED_95.english: Then, I like a wife with a kind heart like Lise.
BridalClass2-8ED_95.korean: 그럼, 리제 같이 마음이 예쁜 아내가 좋아.

BridalClass2-8ED_97.english: Hey, Janghwa. Why are you suddenly opening a book?
BridalClass2-8ED_97.korean: 야, 장화. 너 갑자기 왜 책을 펴냐?

BridalClass2-8ED_98.english: Hey, you should study. My son… is… going to look like the commander and me, so he’s going to be very cute and pretty…
BridalClass2-8ED_98.korean: 고, 공부 해야 할 거 아냐. 내 아들… 은… 사령관이랑 나를 닮아서, 아주 귀엽고 예쁠 테니까…

ConsumableDesc_Ev_Consumable_BridalClass.english: A cluster of love, a single flower of desire. And a drop of... jealousy. &nIt can be exchanged for other items at the event exchange.
ConsumableDesc_Ev_Consumable_BridalClass.korean: 한 떨기의 사랑과, 한 송이의 욕망. 그리고 한 방울의…질투.&n이벤트 교환소에서 다른 물품으로 교환할 수 있습니다.

EventDesc_Open_Event37.english: A war of flowers competing for the qualities a mother of the new humanity must have!
EventDesc_Open_Event37.korean: 신인류의 어머니가 갖춰야 할 소양을 겨루는 꽃들의 전쟁!

LALALA1ED_1.english: I'm going to throw a smoke grenade. Epsilon, take cover and flank!
LALALA1ED_1.korean: 탄 맞았어! 북쪽 능선에서 쏘는 것 같아!

LALALA1ED_10.korean: 좋아, 그럼 처리해줘 나는 나머지 한 녀석을 찾아볼게.

LALALA1ED_11.english: - Alright, with Epsilon's skills, he'll finish this without any trouble, so I'll draw the enemies' attention and…

LALALA1ED_12.korean: - 좋아, 엡실론의 실력이라면 무리 없이 마무리할 테니까 나는 적들의 시선을 끌어서…

LALALA1ED_14.english: I think my location has been discovered.

LALALA1ED_15.english: It's okay, I'll keep an eye on them so they can't get close to you.

LALALA1ED_16.korean: 괜찮아, 네 쪽으로 접근하지 못 하게 내가 견제하고 있을 게.

LALALA1ED_17.english: Gasp, where? Do you know the location?

LALALA1ED_18.english: I'm not sure... It's probably the same building.

LALALA1ED_19.english: Same building? Didn't you hear the sound?
LALALA1ED_19.korean: 잘 모르겠어... 아마도 같은 건물 같아.

LALALA1ED_2.english: They probably haven't figured out your location yet.
LALALA1ED_2.korean: 연막 하나 던질 게, 엡실론은 엄폐하면서 옆으로 돌아!

LALALA1ED_21.english: You might be surrounded, so get out of here! I'll keep an eye on you! You have any smoke grenades left, right? Throw one!

LALALA1ED_22.korean: 포위 당했을 수도 있으니까 빠져나와 내가 봐줄 게! 연막 남은 거 있지? 하나 던져!

LALALA1ED_23.english: Huh? Epsilon, that's not smoke, it's a grenade—

LALALA1ED_24.korean: 어? 엡실론 그거 연막 아니고 수류탄ㅡ

LALALA1ED_29.english: It's okay, there are situations like this.

LALALA1ED_3.korean: 아직 네 위치를 파악하지 못했을 거야.

LALALA1ED_33.english: Epsilon... is something bothering you by any chance?

LALALA1ED_36.english: I guess you could say it felt like a mistake the usual Epsilon wouldn't have made...

LALALA1ED_37.english: As if missing the shot or failing to notice the enemy approaching wasn't enough, at the very end, you even mistook a smoke screen for a grenade.
LALALA1ED_37.korean: 평소의 엡실론이라면 하지 않을 실수였다는 느낌이 들었달까…

LALALA1ED_38.english: If anything is wrong, I am fully available to consult with you.
LALALA1ED_38.korean: 공격을 빗 맞추거나 적의 접근을 눈치채지 못하는 것도 모자라서, 심지어 마지막은 연막이랑 수류탄을 착각했잖아.

LALALA1ED_39.korean: 혹시 무슨 일이 있는 거라면 얼마든지 상담 가능한데.

LALALA1ED_40.english: But it's okay, I'm just not feeling well.

LALALA1ED_41.english: If that is the case, it’s a relief, but…
LALALA1ED_41.korean: 하지만 괜찮아, 그냥 조금 컨디션이 안 좋을 뿐이야.

LALALA1ED_42.english: It's really fine... so go ahead, let's get to the next match.

LALALA1ED_43.english: You worked hard. Thanks to you, I had a great time today.
LALALA1ED_43.korean: 정말로 괜찮으니까… 자, 어서 다음 매칭 돌리자.

LALALA1ED_44.english: Yeah, I enjoyed it too. Invite me again next time.

LALALA1ED_45.english: How about next week? Is it okay?
LALALA1ED_45.korean: 응, 나도 즐거웠어. 다음에 또 불러줘.

LALALA1ED_46.english: I don't think I can make it next week. I have a schedule.

LALALA1ED_47.english: Schedule? Did you decide to do something with Ireina?
LALALA1ED_47.korean: 다음 주는 안 될 것 같아. 일정이 있거든.

LALALA1ED_49.english: If that's the case, it can't be helped. Then let's do it next time.

LALALA1ED_50.korean: 그런 거라면 어쩔 수 없지. 그럼 다음에 하자.

LALALA1ED_51.english: Well then, I'll be going now.

LALALA1ED_54.english: In the end, Epsilon looked like he wasn't in good condition...

LALALA1ED_55.english: - I said it was fine, but it still weighs on my mind.
LALALA1ED_55.korean: - 결국 마지막까지 엡실론의 상태 안 좋아 보였지…

LALALA1ED_56.korean: - 말로는 괜찮다고 했지만, 역시 마음에 걸려.

LALALA1ED_57.english: - Alright, isn't it the commander's job to act proactively in times like this?

LALALA1ED_58.korean: - 좋아, 이럴 때 적극적으로 행동하는 게 사령관이 해야할 일이 아니겠어?

LALALA1ED_6.english: Found an enemy! One behind the tree in direction 355, distance 120.

LALALA1ED_61.english: Ahaha... When will I restore this...

LALALA1ED_62.english: Huh? You're asking if something's wrong with Epsilon? I'll lure a few mobs over.

LALALA1ED_63.english: We duoed together yesterday, and you looked a bit off. Alright, ready for my high-damage cycle!
LALALA1ED_63.korean:
응? 엡실론 언니에게 무슨 일 있냐고?
몹 몇 무리 몰아 올게.

LALALA1ED_64.english: Ah, come to think of it, is it already that time? Oh, there are more people flocking here than I expected.
LALALA1ED_64.korean:
어제 같이 듀오 했는데 뭔가 상태가 좀 이상해 보였거든.
좋아, 빡딜 사이클 대기 중!

LALALA1ED_65.english: What time period? Wait, isn't that too much? My range skill is on cooldown...
LALALA1ED_65.korean:
아, 그러고 보니 벌써 그 시기인가?
오오, 생각보다 더 많이 몰려들었네.

LALALA1ED_66.english: I don't know the exact details, but every year around this time, Epsilon-nee seemed so listless, as if she were lost in worry. It's okay, it's okay, you can do it! Demon King Oppa!
LALALA1ED_66.korean:
무슨 시기?
잠깐, 너무 많은 거 아니야? 나 범위기 쿨인데...

LALALA1ED_67.english: Hmm, the fact that it's been like this every year means there really is something going on. Argh~ My fingers are going to break~ Keep a close eye on the trolling!
LALALA1ED_67.korean:
나도 자세히는 모르지만, 매년 이 시기만 되면 엡실론 언니는 고민에 빠진 것처럼 기운이 없었어.
괜찮아, 괜찮아 할 수 있어! 마왕 오빠!

LALALA1ED_68.english: Still, Epsilon will go back to her usual self in a few days, so you don't need to worry too much. Don't worry! Leave Tang to Ireina!
LALALA1ED_68.korean:
흠, 매년 그래왔다는건 역시 뭔가가 있다는 건데.
크으아아~ 손가락 부러지겠다~ 어그로 튀지 않게 잘 잡아줘!

LALALA1ED_69.korean:
그래도 며칠 있으면 다시 평소의 엡실론 언니로 돌아오니까 그렇게 걱정하지 않아도 괜찮아.
걱정마! 탱은 이레이나에게 맡겨!

LALALA1ED_7.english: Epsilon, can you aim for it from your side?
LALALA1ED_7.korean: 적 찾았어! 355 방향 나무 뒤 하나, 거리 120.

LALALA1ED_70.english: I told you to trust only Ireina!

LALALA1ED_71.english: Hero Ireina... Thank you for saving me.

LALALA1ED_72.english: Ahem! Praise Hero Ireina a little more!

LALALA1ED_73.english: As expected of the hero Ireina! She effortlessly accomplishes things that no one else can! I am drawn to that sight! I find myself admiring her!
LALALA1ED_73.korean: 엣헴! 좀 더 용사 이레이나를 칭찬하도록!

LALALA1ED_74.korean: 역시 용사 이레이나야! 아무나 할 수 없는 일을 태연히 해치워! 그 모습에 끌려! 동경하게 돼!

LALALA1ED_76.english: You looked so down... I wondered if there was something wrong and if there was a problem, if there was a way I could help.

LALALA1ED_77.english: The Demon King is still the same, too.
LALALA1ED_77.korean: 너무 기운이 없어 보이니까… 혹시 무슨 문제가 있는 거라면 내가 도와줄 방법은 없을까 했지.

LALALA1ED_79.english: I wonder why the Epsilon energy disappears every year around this time.

LALALA1ED_8.korean: 엡실론 네 쪽에서 노릴 수 있어?

LALALA1ED_80.korean: 왜 매년 이 시기가 되면 엡실론 기운이 없어지는지 말이야.

LALALA1ED_81.english: In that case, why don't we take this opportunity to figure out the reason together?

LALALA1ED_82.english: You never know if we might be able to find a way to help Epsilon.
LALALA1ED_82.korean: 그렇다면 이번 기회에 같이 이유를 밝혀내보지 않을래?

LALALA1ED_83.english: If it's for Epsilon, I like it!
LALALA1ED_83.korean: 엡실론을 도와줄 수 있을 방법을 찾아낼 수 있을지 모르잖아.

LALALA1ED_84.english: Alright, then let's cheer up Epsilon together!
LALALA1ED_84.korean: 엡실론 언니를 위한 거라면 난 좋아!

LALALA1ED_85.english: Thus, a new party was formed.
LALALA1ED_85.korean: 좋아, 그럼 같이 엡실론을 기운나게 해보자고!

LALALA1ED_9.english: Okay, then take care of that. I'll look for the other one.

LALALA2ED_100.korean: 어? 마왕 오빠, 이거 봐봐 엔딩 크레딧…

LALALA2ED_101.english: Planning: Lemonade Epsilon Programming: Lemonade Epsilon Character Design: Lemonade Epsilon

LALALA2ED_102.korean:
《기획 : 레모네이드 엡실론》
《프로그래밍 : 레모네이드 엡실론》
《캐릭터 디자인 : 레모네이드 엡실론》

LALALA2ED_103.english: The bottom part is also all Epsilon's name.

LALALA2ED_104.english: Is this a game Epsilon made himself...?
LALALA2ED_104.korean: 밑에 부분도 전부 엡실론 언니 이름이야.

LALALA2ED_105.english: "Congratulations on clearing the game." "Would you like to save your clear data?"

LALALA2ED_108.english: Hmm... I don't know either. I just played this game for the first time today, you know?

LALALA2ED_109.korean: 으응... 이건 나도 모르겠어. 나는 이 게임을 오늘 처음했는 걸?

LALALA2ED_110.english: In the list of clear data, there was one piece of data that appeared to have already been saved.

LALALA2ED_111.english: - Along with a display of a name that appears to be the person who saved that data…
LALALA2ED_111.korean: - 클리어 데이터를 저장하는 목록에는, 기존에 이미 저장되어 있던 걸로 보이는 데이터가 한 가지 있었다.

LALALA2ED_112.english: 《Save Data 1》 《Save Date: 2XXX - XX - XX》 《Player: Hero Ireina》
LALALA2ED_112.korean: - 그 데이터를 저장한 인물로 보이는 이름의 표시와 함께…

LALALA2ED_113.english: The next day, I played the game again with Ireina's help to check the mysterious save data.
LALALA2ED_113.korean:
《저장 데이터 1》
《저장 날짜 : 2XXX - XX - XX》
《플레이어 : 용사 이레이나》

LALALA2ED_35.english: I've been following Epsilon around all day today... what do you think?

LALALA2ED_36.korean: 오늘 하루 종일 쭉 엡실론을 따라다녀 봤는데… 어떻게 생각해?

LALALA2ED_37.english: I don't understand a single thing!

LALALA2ED_38.english: I'm sure you know for sure that it's different from usual, but...

LALALA2ED_39.korean: 분명 평소와는 다르다는 걸 확실히 알겠지만…

LALALA2ED_41.english: There wasn't really anything that seemed like the cause.

LALALA2ED_42.english: Hmm... It's not because I haven't returned my sister's squid doll since I borrowed it, is it...

LALALA2ED_43.english: - It’s perhaps natural that I wouldn’t know, since I’ve only watched for a mere day.
LALALA2ED_43.korean: 흐음… 내가 언니 오징어 인형을 빌려 간 후로 안 돌려줘서 그런 건 아니겠지…

LALALA2ED_44.english: - Ireina said that every year around this time, Epsilon seems listless, as if he is lost in thought.
LALALA2ED_44.korean: - 고작 하루 밖에 지켜보지 못했으니 알 수 없는 건 어쩌면 당연해.

LALALA2ED_45.english: That implies that this isn't the first or second time this has happened...
LALALA2ED_45.korean: - 이레이나는 매년 이 시기가 되면 엡실론이 고민에 빠진 것처럼 기운이 없다고 그랬어.

LALALA2ED_46.english: If Ireina, who is always with him, doesn't know the cause, it might be a reason that isn't apparent on the surface.
LALALA2ED_46.korean: - 그 말은 지금까지 한두 번 있었던 일이 아니라는 말이 되는데...

LALALA2ED_47.korean: - 늘 같이 있는 이레이나가 그 원인을 모른다면, 겉으로는 알 수 없는 이유일지도 몰라.

LALALA2ED_48.english: Ireina, what does Epsilon usually do when he is mentally connected to Leica?

LALALA2ED_49.korean: 이레이나, 엡실론이 라이카 안에 정신을 접속하고 있을 때는 보통 뭘 하고 있어?

LALALA2ED_50.english: Hmm... sometimes she plays games alone, sometimes she plays with me, very, very occasionally she does work, sometimes she sleeps... but in the end, I guess it's always about games?

LALALA2ED_51.korean: 음… 언니 혼자 게임을 하거나, 나랑 같이 게임을 하거나, 아주 아주 가끔은 업무를 볼 때도 있고, 잠을 잘 때도 있고… 그래도 결국은 게임이려나?

LALALA2ED_52.english: There is strictly privacy between me and Epsilon, so I don't approach her personal space carelessly.

LALALA2ED_53.english: Really? That's unexpected. I thought there wasn't anything like that between the two of you.
LALALA2ED_53.korean: 나랑 엡실론 언니 사이에도 엄연히 프라이버시라는 게 있어서 개인적인 공간에는 함부러 접근하지 않고 있어.

LALALA2ED_54.english: I don't really care, but Epsilon seems to care.
LALALA2ED_54.korean: 정말? 의외네. 둘 사이에는 그런 게 없는 줄 알았는데.

LALALA2ED_55.english: Hmm... I think... the cause might be inside Leica, Epsilon's private space...
LALALA2ED_55.korean: 나는 딱히 신경쓰지 않지만, 엡실론 언니는 신경 쓰는 것 같아.

LALALA2ED_56.english: I guess it'll be hard to figure this out, right?
LALALA2ED_56.korean: 흠… 내 생각엔 말이야... 원인이 엡실론의 개인 공간인 라이카 안에 있을 거 같은데…

LALALA2ED_58.english: Because ~ Ta-da~ Kibi is right here!

LALALA2ED_60.english: Kibi was made using a Leica! So it's like a part of the Leica!

LALALA2ED_61.english: You can also access Leica anytime!
LALALA2ED_61.korean: 키비는 라이카를 사용해서 만들어졌거든! 그래서 라이카의 일부 같은 거야!

LALALA2ED_62.english: But then, won't Epsilon find out?
LALALA2ED_62.korean: 언제든지 라이카에 접속도 할 수 있어!

LALALA2ED_63.english: Hmm... it should be fine if you connect in offline mode.

LALALA2ED_64.english: If Epsilon tries to check properly, she'll get caught, but she definitely won't bother checking every single one.
LALALA2ED_64.korean: 음… 오프라인 모드로 접속하면 괜찮을 거야.

LALALA2ED_65.english: Now that we've talked about it, let's go in right now! Seeing as Epsilon's activity logs are about to stop, it looks like she's in dreamland!
LALALA2ED_65.korean: 엡실론 언니가 제대로 확인하려 들면 들키겠지만, 분명 귀찮아서 일일이 확인 안 할 거야.

LALALA2ED_66.english: Demon King, sit here and put Kibi on your head!
LALALA2ED_66.korean: 말 나온 지금 당장 들어가 보자! 마침 엡실론 언니 활동 기록도 끊길 걸 보니 꿈나라에 있는 것 같고!

LALALA2ED_67.english: Uh...? Huh...? Th-this squid like this? But why...?
LALALA2ED_67.korean: 마왕 오빠 여기 앉아서 키비를 머리 위에 올려!

LALALA2ED_68.english: And I, hehehe~ sit on the Demon King's lap~ in my reserved seat~
LALALA2ED_68.korean: 어…? 응…? 이, 이 오징어를 이렇게? 근데 왜…?

LALALA2ED_69.korean: 그리고 나는 에헤헤~ 마왕 오빠 무릎 위에~ 지정석~

LALALA2ED_70.english: Departing? Where to? Ireina, wait a moment—

LALALA2ED_72.english: As Ireina declared the start, my vision flickered along with a familiar sensation I had felt before.

LALALA2ED_73.korean: - 이레이나가 출발 선언을 하자 나는 이전에 느꼈던 익숙한 감각과 함께 시야가 점멸했다.

LALALA2ED_75.english: They walked in so casually in the blink of an eye…
LALALA2ED_75.korean: 라이카 안에 있는 엡실론 언니의 방이야.

LALALA2ED_76.english: Well, if you consider this all virtual reality, it isn't that strange, is it?
LALALA2ED_76.korean: 눈 깜짝할 사이에 아무렇지도 않게 들어와 버렸네…

LALALA2ED_77.english: So what are you going to do now, Demon King?
LALALA2ED_77.korean: 뭐, 이것도 전부 가상 현실이라고 생각하면 크게 이상할 건 없나.

LALALA2ED_78.english: Um... since it's my first time coming in here.
LALALA2ED_78.korean: 그럼 이제부터 어떻게 할 거야? 마왕 오빠?

LALALA2ED_79.english: Is there anything that looks different from usual to Ireina? Even something small is fine.
LALALA2ED_79.korean: 음… 난 여기에 들어오는 건 처음이니까.

LALALA2ED_80.english: The difference from Epsilon's usual room…
LALALA2ED_80.korean: 이레이나가 보기에 평소랑 달라 보이는 게 있어? 사소한 거라도 좋으니까.

LALALA2ED_81.korean: 평소 엡실론 언니의 방이랑 다른 점…

LALALA2ED_83.english: It's a game I've never seen before.

LALALA2ED_84.english: There isn't a single game among Epsilon's that I don't know.

LALALA2ED_85.english: There was no mention of finding a new game recently… so it might be a game they didn't tell me about…
LALALA2ED_85.korean: 엡실론 언니가 가지고 있는 게임 중에 내가 모르는 게임은 없는데.

LALALA2ED_86.english: A game that Epsilon hid even from Ireina…
LALALA2ED_86.korean: 최근에 새로운 게임을 찾았다는 말은 없었는데… 그렇다면 나한테 말해주지 않은 게임 일지도…

LALALA2ED_88.english: Aside from this, it doesn't seem like there is anything else that can be investigated right now.

LALALA2ED_89.english: I can't guarantee it, but I have a strange feeling that this game might be the cause...
LALALA2ED_89.korean: 이것 말고는 지금 당장 조사할 수 있을 만한 건 없어 보이기도 하고.

LALALA2ED_90.korean: 장담은 할 수 없지만, 이 게임이 원인일 거라는… 어떤 기묘한 감각이 느껴져.

LALALA2ED_91.english: Alright then, let's start the game!

LALALA2ED_94.english: Yeah, I'm awake... Demon King Oppa...

LALALA2ED_95.english: It was hard, but fun, right?

LALALA2ED_96.english: It was the best RPG game I've played recently!

LALALA2ED_97.english: I was planning to do some research related to Epsilon, but I ended up watching the ending before I knew it.
LALALA2ED_97.korean: 최근에 했던 RPG 게임 중에서 최고였어!

LALALA2ED_98.english: The ending credits are rolling, too.
LALALA2ED_98.korean: 엡실론이랑 관련된 조사를 할 생각이었는데 얼떨결에 엔딩까지 봐버렸네.

LALALA2ED_99.english: Huh? Demon King Oppa, look at this... the ending credits...

LALALA3ED_1.english: 《Save Data 1》 《Save Date: 2XXX - XX - XX》 《Player: Hero Ireina》
LALALA3ED_1.korean: - 다음날 나는 의문의 저장 데이터를 확인하고자, 이레이나의 도움을 받아 그 게임을 다시 플레이 했다.

LALALA3ED_10.english: I decided to make a game as a birthday gift for Ireina on X month XX day.
LALALA3ED_10.korean: 응? 이건 개발 진척 주석? 엡실론이 적은 건가?

LALALA3ED_11.english: There are about four months left until his birthday, and as for the genre... he says he'd like an RPG. I was planning to keep it a secret... He's such a quick-witted kid.
LALALA3ED_11.korean:
X월 XX일
예레나의 생일 선물로 게임을 제작하기로 했습니다.

LALALA3ED_12.english: I implemented the dialogue window and choice UI for X Month X Day.
LALALA3ED_12.korean:
생일까지는 약 4개월, 장르는... 본인은 RPG가 좋겠다고 하는 군요.
비밀로 할 생각이었는데… 정말 눈치가 빠른 아이입니다.

LALALA3ED_13.english: Ireina said, "If the options are too stiff, it doesn't feel like I chose them," so I tried adding Ireina's mannerisms to each option, and surprisingly, it doesn't seem too bad.
LALALA3ED_13.korean:
X월 X일
대사 창과 선택지 UI를 구현했습니다.

LALALA3ED_14.english: Today, on Month XX, I built a field map.
LALALA3ED_14.korean: 예레나가 '선택지가 너무 딱딱하면 내가 고른 느낌이 안 난다'고 해서, 선택지 마다 예레나의 말 버릇을 넣어 봤는데 의외로 나쁘지 않은 것 같군요.

LALALA3ED_15.english: I was debating whether or not to include a minimap. Ireina advised me that "getting lost is part of the fun, so being too helpful isn't good." In that case, I guess I should leave some footprints so you can at least remember the path you've taken.
LALALA3ED_15.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은 필드 맵을 구축했습니다.

LALALA3ED_16.english: Today, on Month XX, we conducted a comprehensive test.
LALALA3ED_16.korean: 미니맵을 넣을지 말지 고민. 예레나는 '길을 잃는 것도 재미인데, 너무 친절하면 좋지 않다고 조언을 해주었습니다. 그렇다면 지나온 길 정도는 알 수 있게 발자국 정도는 남겨야 겠네요.

LALALA3ED_17.english: But… Ireina woke up too quickly.
LALALA3ED_17.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은 종합 테스트를 진행했습니다.

LALALA3ED_18.english: thought the difficulty adjustment was appropriate, but it seems I was too focused on beginners. It would be better to raise the difficulty a bit to better suit Ireina.

LALALA3ED_19.english: Ireina? I've never heard that name before. Is she a human who was with Epsilon in the past?
LALALA3ED_19.korean:
난이도 조절은 적절하다고 생각했는데 너무 초심자 위주로 생각했던 모양입니다.
예레나에게 맞춰 좀 더 난이도를 올리는 게 좋겠습니다.

LALALA3ED_2.english: Do you want to load the selected data?
LALALA3ED_2.korean:
《저장 데이터 1》
《저장 날짜 : 2XXX - XX - XX》
《플레이어 : 용사 이레이나》

LALALA3ED_20.english: Today, on Month XX, we conducted the second comprehensive test.
LALALA3ED_20.korean: 예레나? 처음 듣는 이름인데, 과거에 엡실론과 함께 있던 인간인가?

LALALA3ED_21.english: However, it seems he didn't find playing alone fun. He says he wants to play with me.
LALALA3ED_21.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은 2차 종합 테스트를 진행했습니다.

LALALA3ED_22.english: It was a game made for Ireina... I guess I'll have to modify it to support two-player.
LALALA3ED_22.korean:
그런데 자기 혼자 플레이하니 재미가 없었던 모양입니다.
저와 같이 플레이하고 싶다고 하는군요.

LALALA3ED_23.english: Fortunately, it looks like production will be finished on time on Month XX.
LALALA3ED_23.korean:
예레나를 위해 만든 게임이었는데…
2인 플레이가 가능하도록 수정해야겠네요.

LALALA3ED_24.english: There is much more time left than I thought. I have more than a month to spare.
LALALA3ED_24.korean:
X월 XX일
다행히 시간에 맞춰 제작이 끝날 것 같습니다.

LALALA3ED_25.english: It would be a shame to end it like this, so how about we add a special ending without Ireina knowing?
LALALA3ED_25.korean: 생각보다 시간이 많이 남았군요. 한 달 이상이나 여유롭습니다.

LALALA3ED_26.english: For the special ending… I guess that would be best…
LALALA3ED_26.korean: 이대로 끝내는 건 아쉬우니 예레나 몰래 특별한 엔딩을 넣으면 어떨까요?

LALALA3ED_27.english: It would be nice if you could show me the map filled with flowers that Ireina mentioned in the game before.

LALALA3ED_28.korean: 전에 예레나가 게임에서 말했던 꽃들로 가득 채운 맵을 보여주면 좋겠네요.

LALALA3ED_29.english: Today, Month XX, is… the day before Ireina’s birthday…

LALALA3ED_30.english: I was informed by Ireina's doctor that she has been feeling unwell since last night.
LALALA3ED_30.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은… 예레나의 생일 전날입니다…

LALALA3ED_31.english: They say it is dangerous if the skeleton is not replaced immediately. However, I am not sure if Ireina's body, which was weak to begin with, will be able to withstand it.
LALALA3ED_31.korean: 예레나의 담당의로부터 어젯밤부터 상태가 좋지 않다는 말을 전달받았습니다.

LALALA3ED_32.english: … It will definitely be fine. Because they will return full of energy, just as they always have.
LALALA3ED_32.korean:
당장 골격을 교체하지 않으면 위험하다고 합니다.
하지만 원래 약했던 예레나의 몸이 버텨줄 수 있을 지 모르겠습니다.

LALALA3ED_33.english: I believe that you will overcome the pain and be able to see a flower garden full of your favorite flowers with me.
LALALA3ED_33.korean:
…분명 괜찮을 겁니다.
언제나 그래왔던 것처럼 활기찬 모습으로 돌아올 테니까요.

LALALA3ED_34.english: Like the hero Ireina that the child likes.
LALALA3ED_34.korean: 아픔을 이겨내고 저와 함께 좋아하는 꽃이 가득한 꽃밭을 볼 수 있을 거라고 믿고 있습니다.

LALALA3ED_35.english: That is the end of the note's record...

LALALA3ED_36.english: The fact that there is no content in the latter part is…

LALALA3ED_37.english: Yeah... it's just as the commander thinks.

LALALA3ED_41.english: Well, it's not like I was keeping it a secret or anything...

LALALA3ED_42.english: I never imagined the Commander would sneak into my private space and peek like this, but...
LALALA3ED_42.korean: 뭐, 딱히 비밀로 하고 있었던 것도 아니고…

LALALA3ED_43.korean: 설마 사령관이 이렇게 내 사적인 공간까지 몰래 들어와서 훔쳐볼 줄은 몰랐지만…

LALALA3ED_44.english: I'm sorry... and Ireina has nothing to do with this. I forced her to do it all.

LALALA3ED_45.english: Hehehe... You're such a reliable older brother.
LALALA3ED_45.korean: 미안… 그리고 이레이나는 이번 일이랑 상관없어. 전부 내가 억지로 부탁한 거야.

LALALA3ED_46.english: I never thought Ireina and the Commander would form a detective team…

LALALA3ED_47.english: I know that the two of them did this for me.
LALALA3ED_47.korean: 이레이나랑 사령관이 탐정 팀을 만들 줄이야…

LALALA3ED_48.english: I actually think it's my fault for making you worry.
LALALA3ED_48.korean: 두 사람이 날 위해서 이런 행동을 했다는 것 쯤은 알고 있어.

LALALA3ED_49.english: I'm sorry, Commander. Thank you, Ireina.
LALALA3ED_49.korean: 오히려 걱정하게 만든 내 잘못이라고 생각해.

LALALA3ED_50.english: So, the reason you've looked down lately, Epsilon, is indeed…

LALALA3ED_51.english: Yeah, Ireina's birthday is coming up soon.
LALALA3ED_51.korean: 그러면 최근 엡실론 네가 기운이 없어 보였던 이유는 역시…

LALALA3ED_53.english: It is also the anniversary of Ireina's death.

LALALA3ED_54.english: That child was naturally physically weak.

LALALA3ED_55.english: Treatment wasn't easy either, as my constitution didn't tolerate Origin Dust well.

LALALA3ED_56.korean: 오리진 더스트도 잘 받지 않은 체질 때문에 치료도 쉽지 않았어.

LALALA3ED_57.english: Hmm... I definitely said I was fine. I guess I can't help feeling like my embarrassing past has been exposed.

LALALA3ED_58.english: Anyway, if it felt like I was hiding something... I apologize.
LALALA3ED_58.korean: 음… 분명 괜찮다고 말했는데. 역시 부끄러운 과거를 들킨 기분은 어쩔 수 없네.

LALALA3ED_59.english: Things will go back to normal in a few days.

LALALA3ED_6.english: Work menu icon, test goods, dummy data equipment…

LALALA3ED_60.english: Let's play games together again then, Commander.
LALALA3ED_60.korean: 며칠 뒤면 다시 평소처럼 돌아갈 테니까.

LALALA3ED_62.english: You're not going to play this game again now that you've finished it?

LALALA3ED_63.korean: 완성한 이 게임을 다시 플레이 하진 않을 거야?

LALALA3ED_64.english: Isn't there something you want to see?

LALALA3ED_68.english: Because there is no one to watch it with.

LALALA3ED_69.english: Demon King, did you wake up?

LALALA3ED_7.korean: 작업 메뉴 아이콘, 테스트용 재화, 더미 데이터 장비…

LALALA3ED_72.english: Come to think of it, I logged in directly from here...

LALALA3ED_73.korean: 그러고 보니 여기서 바로 접속 했었지…

LALALA3ED_74.english: There's no need to apologize. Thanks for helping me, Ireina.

LALALA3ED_75.korean: 미안해 할 거 없어. 도와줘서 고마워 이레이나.

LALALA3ED_76.english: I connected to Leica but it isn't coming out.

LALALA3ED_78.english: What are you going to do now?

LALALA3ED_8.english: In that case, the owner of the account is indeed Epsilon...

LALALA3ED_81.english: Since Epsilon said it's fine, there shouldn't be any major problems.

LALALA3ED_82.english: It became clear that if I just waited a few days, she would return to her normal self as if nothing had happened, but…
LALALA3ED_82.korean: - 엡실론이 괜찮다고 말한 이상 큰 문제는 없겠지.

LALALA3ED_83.english: After all, isn't it the commander's job to act proactively in times like this?
LALALA3ED_83.korean: - 며칠만 기다리면 아무렇지 않게 평소의 모습으로 돌아올 거라는 게 분명해졌지만…

LALALA3ED_84.korean: - 역시 이럴 때 적극적으로 행동하는 게 사령관이 해야할 일이 아니겠어?

LALALA3ED_85.english: Huh? What's wrong? Is it the Demon King?

LALALA3ED_86.english: Can you help me with just one more thing?

LALALA3ED_87.english: I made it exactly as the Demon King told me to... Is this okay?
LALALA3ED_87.korean: 한 가지만 더 도와줄 수 있어?

LALALA3ED_9.english: Huh? Is this a development progress comment? Did epsilon write too little?

LALALA4ED_1.korean: 마왕 오빠가 얘기했던 대로 만들어놨는데... 이걸로 괜찮아?

LALALA4ED_10.korean: - 그날 밤, 나는 엡실론의 방으로 찾아갔다.

LALALA4ED_12.english: What's going on? At this hour of the night?

LALALA4ED_13.english: was about to go to sleep...

LALALA4ED_17.english: Wait, wait, like this so suddenly?

LALALA4ED_19.english: It's not that... I don't like it...

LALALA4ED_2.english: It was a bit of a stretch, but thank you, Ireina.

LALALA4ED_20.english: Should I rather say it's welcome... If it's the commander, there's no reason to refuse...

LALALA4ED_21.english: I thought a day like this would come someday, but... it was so sudden...
LALALA4ED_21.korean: 오히려 환영이라고 해야 하나... 사령관이라면 거부할 이유도 없고…

LALALA4ED_22.english: Just because I'm feeling down, cheering me up like this is a bit...
LALALA4ED_22.korean: 언젠가 이런 날이 올 거라고는 생각했는데 그게… 너무 갑작스러워서…

LALALA4ED_23.english: Ah! That doesn't mean I dislike it at all, though...
LALALA4ED_23.korean: 내가 기운이 없다고 해서 이런 방식으로 복돋아주는 건 좀…

LALALA4ED_24.english: Oh, come to think of it, I didn't take a shower today—
LALALA4ED_24.korean: 아! 그렇다고 싫은 건 절대 아니고…

LALALA4ED_25.korean: 앗, 그러고 보니 나 오늘 샤워 안했ㅡ

LALALA4ED_27.english: To think it's actually good... Commander...

LALALA4ED_3.english: It's for Epsilon and the Demon King, of all people!

LALALA4ED_30.english: It's my first time, so please be kind to me...

LALALA4ED_32.english: ...Huh? Connection? What… connection? The Commander's physical… connection?

LALALA4ED_33.english: Didn't you say you were sleeping? I thought it was going inside the Leica, but isn't it?
LALALA4ED_33.korean: ...응? 접속? 무슨… 접속? 사령관의 물리적… 접속?

LALALA4ED_34.korean: 잔다고 하지 않았어? 나는 그게 라이카 안으로 들어간다는 줄 알았는데 아니야?

LALALA4ED_35.english: Commander... are you doing this on purpose because I didn't wash?

LALALA4ED_36.korean: 사령관... 나 안 씻었다고 일부러 그러는 거야?

LALALA4ED_38.english: I'm not entirely sure, but I just need to take the commander along, right?

LALALA4ED_39.english: Then come closer and lie down next to me.
LALALA4ED_39.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만, 사령관도 같이 데려가면 되는 거지?

LALALA4ED_4.english: Trust Ireina and leave it to her!
LALALA4ED_4.korean: 다른 누구도 아닌 엡실론 언니와 마왕 오빠를 위한 일인 걸!

LALALA4ED_40.korean: 그럼 일로 가까이 와서 내 옆에 누워.

LALALA4ED_42.english: Oops... Epsilon? I think you're hugging too tightly.

LALALA4ED_43.english: Are you angry by any chance?
LALALA4ED_43.korean: 웁… 엡실론? 너무 꽉 안은 거 같은데.

LALALA4ED_47.english: Huh? The connection location looks different than usual.

LALALA4ED_48.korean: 응? 뭔가 평소 접속 로케이션이 다른데?

LALALA4ED_5.english: From here on, it all depends on the Demon King!

LALALA4ED_51.english: How is it? I tried to recreate it as best as possible.

LALALA4ED_52.english: I hope it's similar to the special ending Epsilon created...

LALALA4ED_53.english: I knew that Ireina and the other person were plotting something together, but...
LALALA4ED_53.korean: 엡실론이 만들었던 특별한 엔딩과 비슷하면 좋겠는데…

LALALA4ED_54.english: Were you preparing for something like this?
LALALA4ED_54.korean: 이레이나랑 둘이서 뭘 꾸미고 있다는 건 알았지만…

LALALA4ED_55.english: Furthermore, manipulating the Leica at will…

LALALA4ED_56.english: Did the commander prepare this outfit too?

LALALA4ED_57.english: It's nice to have special outfits for a special ending, isn't it?

LALALA4ED_58.english: Yeah, just as expected, it suits you well. You look really pretty, Epsilon.
LALALA4ED_58.korean: 특별한 엔딩에는 특별한 의상이 있는 게 좋잖아?

LALALA4ED_59.english: Seriously, if you say it like that, there's nothing I can say.
LALALA4ED_59.korean: 응, 역시 예상대로 잘 어울려. 정말 예뻐, 엡실론.

LALALA4ED_60.english: I just told you the truth.
LALALA4ED_60.korean: 정말, 그렇게 말해버리면 뭐라 할 수도 없잖아.

LALALA4ED_63.english: … Isn't it pretty? It’s a flower named Moonlight Herb. It blooms only in special places and emits light when the moon rises… it’s a flower with that kind of game setting.

LALALA4ED_64.english: That child… really loved this place where the flowers bloomed so fully…
LALALA4ED_64.korean:
…예쁘지? 월광초라는 이름의 꽃이야.​
특별한 장소에서만 피고, 달이 떠올랐을 때 빛을 낸다는… 그런 게임 설정을 가진 꽃이지.

LALALA4ED_65.english: Honestly, I never thought I’d see this flower again. Because we couldn’t keep our promise to go to a special place full of flowers, just the two of us, like in a game.
LALALA4ED_65.korean: 그 아이가… 이 꽃이 가득 피어난 장소를 정말 좋아했거든…

LALALA4ED_66.english: After that, I thought this scenery would remain only in the stored data. But I never expected the Commander... to recreate it exactly as it was in my dream like this.
LALALA4ED_66.korean:
솔직히, 이 꽃을 다시 보게 될 줄은 몰랐어.​
둘이서 같이, 게임처럼 꽃이 가득 핀 특별한 장소에 가보자는 약속을… 지킬 수 없게 됐으니까.

LALALA4ED_67.english: … Thank you. It was a scene that was too painful to forget, yet a little scary to recall again. If it weren't for you, Commander, I probably would have kept it buried deep inside for the rest of my life.
LALALA4ED_67.korean:
그 뒤로 이 풍경은, 그냥 저장된 데이터 속에서만 남아 있겠구나, 그렇게 생각했어.​
그런데 이렇게 사령관이… 내 꿈속에 그대로 재현해 줄 거라고는 예상하지 못했네.

LALALA4ED_68.english: Because thanks to you, I can cherish such a beautiful moment again... I hope that from now on, the person who comes to mind whenever I see this flower is the Commander. That child... is probably wishing for that too.
LALALA4ED_68.korean:
…고마워, 잊어버리기엔 너무 아프고, 그렇다고 다시 떠올리기엔 조금 겁나는 장면이었거든.​
사령관이 아니었으면, 아마 평생 그대로 깊은 곳에 묻어 두려고 했을 거야.

LALALA4ED_69.english: By the way, Commander? In that game, do you know what event happens when you enter this special place?
LALALA4ED_69.korean:
덕분에 이렇게 예쁜 순간을 다시 간직할 수 있게 됐으니까...​
앞으로 이 꽃을 보게 되면 떠오르는 사람은, 사령관이었으면 좋겠어.​
그 아이도… 아마 그렇게 바라고 있을 거야.

LALALA4ED_70.english: Hehe, the hint is that this is an event you can only see if you max out the main heroine's affection level. Oh, and just so you know, it's also a condition for seeing the true ending~
LALALA4ED_70.korean: 그나저나 사령관? 그 게임에서, 이 특별한 장소에 들어오면 무슨 이벤트가 발생하는 지 알아?

LALALA4ED_71.english: Now, since all the conditions have been met... there is only one left. As for the choice that follows this scene... Commander, could you choose it yourself?
LALALA4ED_71.korean:
후후, 힌트는 메인 히로인의 호감도를 최대로 채워야지만 볼 수 있는 이벤트라는 거야.​
아, 참고로 진엔딩을 보기 위한 조건이기도 해~

LALALA4ED_72.english: Don't say such sad things about having no one to watch with in the future.
LALALA4ED_72.korean:
자, 조건은 전부 달성돼있으니까… 이제 남은 건 하나뿐이야.​
이 장면의 이어지는 선택지는… 사령관이 직접 골라 줄래?

LALALA4ED_73.english: From now on, I will look after everything with Epsilon until the very end.
LALALA4ED_73.korean: 앞으로는 같이 볼 사람이 없다는 그런 슬픈 말은 하지 마.

LALALA4ED_74.korean: 이제부터는 내가 끝까지 엡실론과 함께 모든 걸 봐줄 테니까.

LALALA4ED_9.english: That night, I went to Epsilon's room.

LobbyBG_74_Paid_Desc.english: Epsilon invites you to her sanctuary. I would like to sit beside her without a care and count the flowers in the sanctuary.
LobbyBG_74_Paid_Desc.korean: 엡실론이 쉬는 안식처에 당신을 초대합니다. 아무 걱정 없이 그녀 옆에 앉아, 안식처의 꽃들을 헤어 보고 싶네요.

LobbyBG_75_Paid_Desc.english: This is Poseidon's Café, challenging the stronghold of Café Horizon. It would be nice to take a bite of the dessert served by the strongest Bioroid.
LobbyBG_75_Paid_Desc.korean: 카페 호라이즌의 아성에 도전하는 포세이돈의 카페입니다. 최강의 바이오로이드가 대접하는 디저트를 한 입 먹어보는 것도 좋겠지요.

LobbyBG_76_Paid_Desc.english: It is a city bathed in the alluring glow of halogen lights. Shall we turn up the music and run with Cannes until the very end of the night?
LobbyBG_76_Paid_Desc.korean: 할로겐 조명이 요염하게 빛나는 도시입니다. 음악의 볼륨을 높이고 칸과 함께, 이 밤의 끝까지 달려 볼까요?

LobbyStickerPackageDesc_PROPPack_Ev_Cons.english: You can get a bride's bouquet ornament.
LobbyStickerPackageDesc_PROPPack_Ev_Cons.korean: 신부 부케 장식품을 얻을 수 있습니다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV1.korean: 수업은 필요없다. 부러진 뼈가 더 큰 교훈을 새겨줄테니.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV1_1.korean:
단일 대상에게 {0} 보호 무시 피해를 줍니다. 대상의 방어력을 일정 비율 무시합니다.
적중 대상이 피해 무효화 / 피해 최소화 / 전투 속행 상태인 경우, 대상 최대 HP에 비례한 피해를 줍니다.
치명타 시, 2라운드 동안 대상은 스킬 사용 불가 상태가 됩니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV1_2.korean:
지정 범위에 {0} 보호 무시 피해를 줍니다. 대상의 방어력을 일정 비율 무시합니다.
스킬 사용 시, 대상과 자신이 받는 피해가 영구히 증가합니다. 해당 효과는 해로운 효과 해제로 해제할 수 없습니다.
치명타 시, 대상의 강화 효과를 해제합니다.
<출력 제한 해제> 상태일 경우 사용하지만, 연속적으로 사용하지는 않습니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV1_3.korean:
전투 개시 시, 자신의 효과 저항 / 강화 해제 저항이 증가하고 해로운 효과를 해제합니다. 효과는 매 라운드 점감합니다.
매 라운드 첫번째 공격에 대해 자신의 회피가 크게 증가합니다.
공격 받을 시, 모든 적에게 적용된 지원 공격 / 협동 공격 / 반복 행동 효과를 해제합니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV1_4.korean:
라운드 개시 시, 공격기가 아닌 적 수에 비례하여 자신의 AP가 증가합니다.
라운드 개시 시, 모든 적의 AP가 증가하고 표식을 부여합니다.
모든 적은 매 라운드 1회 이상 직접 공격하지 않을 경우, 지속 물리 피해를 입습니다.
공격 받을 시, HP가 30% 이하인 적의 AP가 감소합니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV1_5.korean:
라운드 개시 시, 자신의 공격력 / 치명타가 영구히 증가합니다.
라운드 개시 시 상기 효과가 3중첩 이상인 경우, 방어막 / 피해 감소 무시가 활성화됩니다.
일부 전투원의 존재는 조건을 무시하고 <출력 제한 해제>를 활성화할 수 있습니다.
자신의 공격은 자신의 HP가 낮을 수록 피해량이 증가합니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV2_1.korean:
단일 대상에게 {0} 보호 무시 피해를 줍니다. 대상의 방어력을 일정 비율 무시합니다.
치명타 시, 2라운드 동안 대상은 스킬 사용 불가 상태가 됩니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV2_2.korean:
지정 범위에 {0} 보호 무시 피해를 줍니다. 대상의 방어력을 일정 비율 무시합니다.
치명타 시, 대상의 강화 효과를 해제합니다.
<출력 제한 해제> 상태일 경우 사용하지만, 연속적으로 사용하지는 않습니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV2_3.korean:
전투 개시 시, 자신의 효과 저항 / 강화 해제 저항이 증가합니다. 효과는 매 라운드 점감합니다.
매 라운드 첫번째 공격에 대해 자신의 회피가 크게 증가합니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV2_4.korean:
라운드 개시 시, 공격기가 아닌 적 수에 비례하여 자신의 AP가 증가합니다.
라운드 개시 시, 모든 적의 AP가 증가하고 표식을 부여합니다.
모든 적은 매 라운드 1회 이상 직접 공격하지 않을 경우, 지속 물리 피해를 입습니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_MP_LemonadeGamma13_EV2_5.korean:
라운드 개시 시, 자신의 공격력 / 치명타가 영구히 증가합니다.
라운드 개시 시 상기 효과가 3중첩 이상인 경우, 방어막 / 피해 감소 무시가 활성화됩니다.
일부 전투원의 존재는 조건을 무시하고 <출력 제한 해제>를 활성화할 수 있습니다.

SkinDesc_Skin_BR_Khan_5.english: To her, who has driven across vast sandy plains countless times, a sports car is merely a mood booster, but it is shining in the passenger seat for you. To you, who must have waited for this moment just as eagerly as she has. Today, Khan is with you not as the leader of the Anger of the Horde, but as a woman. Keep the wait short and the excitement long. Even if I were to return to the time when I was captivated by the emotion of love, my choice would still be you. Did your sincerity reach you?
SkinDesc_Skin_BR_Khan_5.korean: 드넓은 모래벌판을 수없이 달려왔을 그녀에게 스포츠카는 그저 기분 내기에 불과하지만 당신을 위해 조수석을 빛내고 있습니다. 그녀만큼이나 이 순간을 손꼽아 기다렸을 당신께. 칸은 오늘 앵거 오브 호드의 대장으로서가 아닌, 한 명의 여자로 당신과 함께합니다. 기다림은 짧게 설렘은 길게. 사랑이란 감정에 매료되었던 이전으로 되돌아간다고 해도, 내 선택은 또다시 너 일 테니. 그런 당신의 진심이 전해진 걸까요?​

SkinDesc_Skin_PECS_LemonadeEpsilon_2.english: It is time to cross the Milky Way and go meet her into a dreamlike realm. Until all the countless hardships and adversities you have endured gather to become a beautiful star. Until you create a new universe with her, shining brilliantly through them. You are my universe, my only one. Please shine with me forever.
SkinDesc_Skin_PECS_LemonadeEpsilon_2.korean: 은하수를 건너 몽환의 꿈속으로 그녀를 마중 나갈 시간입니다. 당신이 겪어온 수많은 고난과 역경이 모두 모여 아름다운 별이 되기까지. 그 사이로 찬란히 빛나는 그녀와 새로운 우주를 만들기까지. 당신은 나의 우주, 나만의 그대. 영원토록 함께 빛나줘.​

SkinDesc_Skin_PECS_LemonadeGamma_2.english: Finally today! Café Poseidon has officially opened and is introducing an exclusive lemonade-themed menu, ambitiously prepared to surpass the operating profits of Café Horizon. Although Merlin—happier than anyone to open the café she has always dreamed of—Rhode, the mischievous troublemaker, and even Honorary Poseidon Merope’s one-day shooting have joined forces, perhaps due to the immense popularity, they appear to be severely short-handed. Gamma’s performance seems more important than anything else for their efforts to bear fruit.
SkinDesc_Skin_PECS_LemonadeGamma_2.korean:
드디어 오늘! 정식으로 오픈한 카페 포세이돈에서 카페 호라이즌의 영업이익을 뛰어넘고자 야심 차게 준비한 레모네이드 테마 독점 메뉴를 선보입니다.
꿈꿔왔던 카페 포세이돈을 오픈할 수 있음에 그 누구보다 기쁠 멀린과 천방지축 사고뭉치 로데, 그리고 명예 포세이돈 메로페의 일일 사격까지 합세했음에도엄청난 인기 때문일까요? 일손이 한참은 모자라 보이네요. 그녀들의 노력이 결실을 맺기 위해서라도 감마의 활약이 무엇보다 중요해 보입니다.​

SkinPackDesc_Skin_BR_Khan_5.english: This is a package containing a luxury fiancé dress for the Quick Khan, one handmade cake, two chocolates, and three synthetic lollipops.
SkinPackDesc_Skin_BR_Khan_5.korean: 신속의 칸 용 럭셔리 피앙세 드레스​와 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkinPackDesc_Skin_PECS_LemonadeEpsilon_2.english: This is a package containing an Astral Dream Dress for Lemonade Epsilon, one handmade cake, two chocolates, and three synthetic lollipops.

SkinPackDesc_Skin_PECS_LemonadeGamma_2.english: This is a package containing a Lemonade Gamma Dragon Captain Maid outfit, one handmade cake, two chocolates, and three synthetic lollipops.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_10.english: It’s not strange for the adjutant to stay by the captain’s side, is it?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_10.korean: 부관이 대장님 곁을 지키는 게 이상한 건 아니잖아요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_100.english: Yeah! Welcome! The same as usual, right?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_100.korean: 응! 어서 와! 평소랑 같은 걸로, 맞지?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_101.english: I'm asking for your help. Lately, I feel like my day doesn't start properly unless I drink Dragon's Coffee.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_101.korean:
부탁할게.
요즘은 용의 커피를 마시지 않으면 하루가 제대로 시작되지 않는 기분이야.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_103.english: Here is the coffee. It just came out.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_103.korean:
커피 여기 있소.
방금 막 내린 참이오.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_104.english: Huh? My order should have just gone in.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_104.korean: 어? 내 주문은 방금 들어갔을 텐데?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_105.english: Haha, if you come at the same time every day and order the same menu like this, your body will naturally remember.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_105.korean: 후후, 이렇게 매일 같은 시간에 와서 같은 메뉴를 시키면 몸이 기억하게 되는 법이오.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_106.english: Or… did you want something a little different today?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_106.korean: 아니면… 오늘은 좀 다른 걸 원했소?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_108.english: Mmm, as expected, Dragon's coffee is delicious.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_109.english: Thank you for always making delicious coffee.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_109.korean: 늘 맛있는 커피를 내려 줘서 고마워.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_11.english: If you go too far, it can become a problem.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_110.english: No. If this has been of even the slightest help to my lord, I would simply be happy.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_110.korean: 아니오. 이걸로 조금이라도 주군께 도움이 되었다면 소관은 기쁠 따름이오.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_114.english: If you open a cafe with me… and make delicious drinks for Arthur
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_114.korean: 저랑 같이 카페를 해서… 맛있는 음료를 아서에게 만들어 준다면

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_115.english: Arthur will definitely drink it happily, too!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_115.korean: 아서도 분명 기뻐하면서 마셔 줄 거라구요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_116.english: Don't you want to see Arthur smiling while drinking the beverage the Captain made himself?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_116.korean: 대장님이 직접 만든 음료를 마시면서 웃는 아서의 모습… 보고 싶지 않으세요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_118.english: Since I have declared that I will do it, I also intend to do it properly.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_118.korean: 하겠다고 선언한 이상, 나 역시 제대로 할 생각이다.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_12.english: So what? What do you want from me?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_121.english: Let's show everyone the spirit of Poseidon!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_122.english: Let me ask you just one last thing, Deputy.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_124.english: They definitely said they would put a uniform on her too…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_125.english: Surely it’s not that unsightly uniform the dragon is wearing, right?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_125.korean: 설마 용이 입고 있는 저런 꼴사나운 유니폼은 아니겠지?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_13.english: … It’s like, I suddenly came to my senses and realized it just turned out that way, something like that…
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_13.korean: …문득 정신 차리고 보니 그냥 그렇게 되어 버렸다, 뭐 이런 느낌이라서…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_14.english: I'm just... accepting it that way too...
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_14.korean: 저도 그냥… 그렇게 받아들이고 있는 중인데요…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_17.english: You have officially joined Orca… right?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_17.korean: 정식으로 오르카에 합류하신 거… 맞으신 거죠?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_19.english: Ah, well... after what happened on the northern front.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_19.korean: 아, 그게요~ 북부 전선에서 있었던 일 이후에

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_20.english: After naturally coming to Orca… and even after the incident was settled, you’ve been staying here ever since, haven’t you?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_20.korean: 자연스럽게 오르카로 오신 뒤… 사건이 일단락된 이후에도 이렇게 쭉 오르카에 계시잖아요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_21.english: I did hear you mention something about being a member of Orca before...
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_21.korean: 전에 ‘오르카의 일원이다’ 뭐다 말씀하신 걸 듣긴 했는데…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_22.english: apologize for asking so late, but have you completed all the formal procedures?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_22.korean: 이렇게 늦게 여쭈어봐서 죄송하지만, 정식 수속 절차는 전부 끝나신 건가요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_24.english: Whether I officially became a member of Orca or not, I don't think that's really your business.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_24.korean: 내가 정식으로 오르카의 일원이 됐건 아니건, 딱히 네가 신경 쓸 일은 아니라고 보는데?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_25.english: That can't be! You have to be careful!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_26.english: I am Merlin, a true member of the Orca!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_27.english: After all, Arthur also asked me to assist Captain Gamma as his subordinate!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_27.korean: 아서에게는 감마 대장님의 부관으로서 옆에서 보좌해 달라는 부탁도 받았으니까요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_28.english: That is why, as a member of Orca!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_28.korean: 그렇기 때문에 저는 오르카 소속 대원으로서!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_29.english: I hold the honorable position of Adjutant (Lieutenant) of Poseidon's Fleet with pride!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_29.korean: 포세이돈 함대의 부관이라는 명예로운 직책을, 자랑스러운 마음으로 맡고 있는 거예요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_30.english: But if Captain Gamma isn't part of Orca...
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_30.korean: 그런데 만약 감마 대장님이 오르카 소속이 아니라면…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_31.english: I am an 'Orca member,' yet I take pride in my position outside of Orca, don't you think?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_31.korean: 저는 ‘오르카 대원’이면서도, 오르카가 아닌 외부에서의 직책을 자랑스러워하는 셈이잖아요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_32.korean: 이건 좀… 문제가 있는 거 아닐까요!?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_33.english: I have absolutely no idea what you are trying to say.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_33.korean: 무슨 말을 하고 싶은 건지 도무지 모르겠다.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_34.english: Hey! It's just... I'm saying there's a problem with my mindset!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_34.korean: 에이! 그냥… 제 마음가짐에 문제가 있다는 거예요~!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_35.english: So please let me know! You have officially joined Orca, right?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_35.korean: 그러니까 알려 주세요! 정식으로 오르카에 합류하신 게 맞는 거죠?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_36.english: If you don't tell me... I'll keep following you for days and days until you do!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_36.korean: 안 알려 주시면… 말해 주실 때까지 몇 날 며칠이고 계속 따라다닐 테니까요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_37.english: Haa... Right, that's right. I officially joined. Got it?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_37.korean: 하아… 그래, 맞다. 정식으로 합류했다. 됐지?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_38.english: Well, do I have to show you the documents if you want?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_40.english: … I see. So you've officially joined?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_42.english: Hahaha... Uhuhu... Uhuhuhu... In that case, Captain Gamma...
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_42.korean: 후후… 우후후… 우흐흐흐흐… 그렇다면 감마 대장님…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_44.english: If you have officially joined Orca… isn't it time to keep your promise?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_44.korean: 오르카에 정식으로 합류하셨다면… 이제 약속을 지켜 주실 때가 온 거 아닐까요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_46.english: If you just brush it off with the words "I forgot," I’m going to be extremely disappointed.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_46.korean: ‘잊었다’는 말로 대충 넘어가버리신다면 무진장 섭섭할 예정이라고요.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_47.english: Do you know how long I have been waiting for this day?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_47.korean: 제가 이날을 얼마나 기다려 왔는지 아세요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_5.english: What are you following me around this time?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_5.korean: 이번엔 또 무슨 일로 졸졸 따라다니는 거냐?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_50.english: I'm talking about the promise you made to open a cafe with me!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_50.korean: 저랑 같이 카페 하겠다고 하신 약속 말이에요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_52.english: I, I clearly told Captain Gamma back then that I would even put a uniform on him!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_52.korean: 저, 그때 감마 대장님께 유니폼도 입힐 거라고 분명히 말했어요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_54.english: Because you said you would grant all my requests, saying, "Okay, okay!"

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_55.english: Haa... I guess the time has finally come...
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_55.korean: 하아… 드디어 올 게 왔나 보군…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_58.english: Hi, Neri! You're cute today, too!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_59.english: Of course! Neri is always cute!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_6.english: As I said before, if you have something to say, come forward and say it.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_6.korean: 전에도 말했지만, 할 말 있으면 앞에 나와서 해라.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_60.english: Did you come as a guest today?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_61.english: Right, please guide the two of them.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_63.english: Okay! You mean two cups of coffee?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_64.english: I will now guide two guests!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_66.english: What do you intend to do by bringing me here?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_67.english: I remember that it wasn't just a simple promise to go on an outing to a cafe together.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_67.korean: 고작 카페로 나들이를 같이 가 주겠다는 단순한 약속이 아니었다는 것쯤은 기억하고 있다.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_68.english: Since you're doing it anyway, you might as well enjoy it!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_69.english: I thought it would be a good idea to show Captain Gamma the fun and cool things about the cafe in person!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_69.korean: 감마 대장님께 카페의 즐거움과 멋진 점을 직접 보여 드리는 게 좋겠다고 생각했거든요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_7.english: W-f-following you? We just happened to have overlapping routes.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_7.korean: 따, 따라다니다뇨? 그냥 동선이 겹친 것뿐인데요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_70.english: If you try the delicious coffee here, your perception of cafes will change!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_70.korean: 여기서 맛있는 커피를 드셔 보시면 카페에 대한 인식이 바뀌실 거예요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_71.english: After all, isn't it just a place to drink beverages?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_71.korean: 그래 봤자 고작 음료 마시는 가게일 뿐 아닌가?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_72.english: Here are two cups of coffee.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_74.english: Come to think of it, you were working at the cafe.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_74.korean: 그러고 보니 카페에서 네가 일하고 있었지.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_75.english: This is the second time I've seen it like this.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_78.english: Even thinking about it again, it's really hard to understand.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_79.english: To think that invincible dragon would wear a uniform and brew coffee.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_79.korean: 그 무적의 용이 유니폼을 입고 커피를 내리는 모습이라니.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_8.english: Do you know that it's already the third day, yet you're making up an excuse?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_8.korean: 그게 벌써 사흘째라는 건 알고서 하는 변명이냐?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_80.english: Right now, I am not the commander of the Horizon fleet, but a barista at Café Horizon.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_80.korean: 지금의 나는 호라이즌 함대의 지휘관이 아니라, 카페 호라이즌의 바리스타요.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_81.english: And I am satisfied with my current job as well.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_81.korean: 그리고 소관은 지금의 일도 만족하고 있소.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_82.english: Haha, you'll find out soon enough, too.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_82.korean: 후후, 그대도 곧 알게 될 거요.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_83.english: Well then, I have business to attend to, so I will be leaving now.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_83.korean: 그럼 소관은 일이 있어 이만 가 보겠소.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_85.english: Wow, as expected, you're so cool today too!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_87.english: I'm not sure if that's cool, but... you still take everything seriously.
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_87.korean: 저게 멋진지는 모르겠다만… 어떤 일이든 진지하게 임하는 모습은 여전하군.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_88.english: Anyway... is this coffee bestowed by a dragon...

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_89.english: I didn't drink when I came before.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_9.english: I am the Chief of Staff of the Poseidon Fleet! You're saying I'm the proud Admiral Gamma's subordinate?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_9.korean: 저는 포세이돈 함대의 참모! 자랑스러운 감마 대장님의 부관이라고요?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_91.english: How is it? The Dance Captain's coffee. It's delicious, isn't it!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_92.english: It's coffee that's so well-received at Orca that all the members come to drink it!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_92.korean: 오르카에서 대원들이 다들 마시러 올 만큼 호평인 커피라구요!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_93.english: Hmm, it certainly tastes good, but...

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_94.english: What's so special about brewing a cup of coffee that you're making such a fuss?
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_94.korean: 커피 한 잔 내리는 게 뭐가 그리 대단하다고 호들갑을 떠는 거냐?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_95.english: Did you just say anyone is coming over for a drink?

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_96.english: It must be hard to understand the guys who go out of their way to come all the way here just to drink this...
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_96.korean: 이걸 마시겠다고 굳이 여기까지 찾아오는 녀석들을… 이해하긴 어렵겠군.

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_97.english: Hmm? The one who just came into the store is…

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_98.english: Welcome to Cafe Horizon— Ah! Master!
WakeUpPoseidon1ED_98.korean: 카페 호라이즌에 어서 오세ㅡ 아! 주인님!

WakeUpPoseidon1ED_99.english: Hi, I came for coffee again today.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_10.english: It's Cafe Poseidon, so what can you do? If we're going to do it, we should all do it together!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_10.korean:
카페 포세이돈이니까 어쩔 수 없잖아?
할 거면 다 같이 해야지!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_100.english: There must be a reason why you, who had no interest in cafes, decided to do it…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_100.korean: 카페에 관심 없던 당신이 '하겠다'고 마음먹은 이유가… 분명 있을 거예요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_101.english: The reason I made up my mind…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_102.english: If you open a cafe with me… and make delicious drinks for Arthur
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_102.korean: 저랑 같이 카페를 해서… 맛있는 음료를 아서에게 만들어 준다면

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_103.english: Arthur will definitely drink it happily, too!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_103.korean: 아서도 분명 기뻐하면서 마셔 줄 거라구요!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_104.english: Don't you want to see Arthur smiling while drinking the beverage the Captain made himself?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_104.korean: 대장님이 직접 만든 음료를 마시면서 웃는 아서의 모습… 보고 싶지 않으세요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_106.english: Is there anything that comes to mind?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_11.english: Come on, you can eat as much cake as you want after practice is over.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_11.korean: 자자, 연습 끝나면 케이크 마음껏 먹어도 되니까.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_110.english: I suppose it means I’m a member of Orca, just like you guys.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_13.english: Okay... but do you really have to give me a cake?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_13.korean: 알았어요… 대신 꼭 케이크 주셔야 해요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_14.english: Yes, I have received an order for a warm latte.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_14.korean: 네, 따뜻한 라떼 한 잔 주문 받았습니다.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_15.english: For the shot, use Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Natural, Medium-Light Roast, with a dosing ratio of 18g to 36g extraction. Pre-infusion is 7 seconds at 93°C, and the total extraction is 28 seconds. Preheat the mug to 80°C, use whole milk instead of low-fat, make the foam very thin with micro foam, and for the latte art, you mean a 6-layer Rosetta instead of a heart, right?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_15.korean: 샷은 에티오피아 예가체프 내추럴로 미디엄 라이트 로스트, 도징 18g 추출 36g 비율에 93도 프리 인퓨전은 7초, 총 추출은 28초. 머그컵은 80도 예열에 우유는 저지방 말고 전지 우유로, 거품은 마이크로 폼 아주 얇게, 라떼아트는 하트 말고 로제타 6겹 말씀이시죠?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_16.english: I'll get it for you right away. Please wait a moment.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_17.korean: 자, 따뜻한 라떼 한 잔 나왔습니다.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_2.english: My order was a strawberry shortcake… a cup of Americano… and… iced tea… *Sob*… what was next…?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_2.korean: 주문은 딸기 쇼트케이크에… 아메리카노 한 잔… 그리고… 아이스티에… 후에엥… 다음은 뭐였죠…?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_22.english: Triton, please make some delicious coffee too!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_23.english: I'll help you so you don't lose to Stronghold!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_23.korean: 스트롱홀드에게 지지 않도록 나도 도와줄 테니까!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_25.english: <Checked all system operations… Integration complete… No operational issues>
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_25.korean: <모든 시스템 작동 점검… 연동 완료… 운영 이상 없음>

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_26.english: High-quality coffee production by military companies possible at any time
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_26.korean: <언제든 군사 기업의 고품질 커피 제조 가능>

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_3.english: There! Start over from the beginning!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_31.english: Captain Gamma, have you had some practice?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_33.english: Ka, Cafe… Posei… Don… Uh, welcome… M… M… Master… Master…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_33.korean: 카, 카페… 포세이… 돈에… 어, 어서 오세요… 주… 주… 주인… 주인님…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_34.english: Hmm... your voice is too quiet.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_35.english: Could you please speak a little louder?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_36.english: Cool like the usual Captain Gamma! Full of confidence!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_36.korean: 평소의 감마 대장님처럼 멋지게! 자신감 넘치게!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_39.english: How is it! Are you satisfied with this!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_4.english: You should be able to easily memorize a spell like this!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_40.english: I like it... but I think all the timid customers will run away.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_40.korean: 저는 좋은데… 겁 많은 손님은 전부 도망갈 것 같네요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_41.english: Didn't you tell me to do that!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_42.english: That is, a little more… softly~

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_43.english: Even while feeling shy~ without losing confidence~ in a gentle voice… isn't there a way?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_43.korean: 부끄러워하면서도~ 자신감은 잃지 않고~ 상냥한 목소리로… 어떻게 안 될까요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_45.english: You can do it, Captain Gamma!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_46.english: Since you declared you would do it, you said you would do it properly... You declared it, didn't you!
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_46.korean: 하겠다고 선언한 이상 제대로 하실 거라고… 선언하셨잖아요!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_47.english: Alright, I'll do anything for you!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_49.english: Okay, next up, with a shy expression~ Hehehehe~

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_5.english: The real thing doesn't end here, you know?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_51.english: "Since I declared I would do it, I will do it properly"... Is that it...

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_54.english: Haha, I don't think I'm in a position to say anything to the dragon either.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_54.korean: 하하, 나도 용에게 뭐라 할 처지는 아닌 것 같군.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_55.english: The old me wouldn't have even been able to imagine it.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_55.korean: 예전의 나라면 상상도 못 했을 테니.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_6.english: Before, all we did was help with simple tasks for the Hounds, who were busy with band practice, but this time we are opening the shop ourselves, so we can't make any mistakes.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_6.korean: 전에는 밴드 연습으로 바쁜 하운드 애들 대신 간단한 업무 지원을 한게 고작이지만, 이번엔 우리가 직접 가게를 여는 거니까 실수하면 안 돼.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_61.english: I've fought with 'you guys' countless times in the past, so there's no way I wouldn't know.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_61.korean: 과거에 ‘너희들’이랑은 수도 없이 싸웠으니, 모를 리가 없지.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_63.english: So, what do you want from me?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_64.english: I heard it from Mr. Merlin.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_65.english: Poseidon is opening a cafe, too.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_66.english: So what? Did you come here to declare war on your rival?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_66.korean: 그래서? 경쟁 상대한테 선전포고라도 하러 왔나?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_67.english: I, I have no intention of doing that!

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_68.english: It might be different if it were the old you... but now you are a fellow member of Orca, aren't you?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_68.korean: 이전의 당신이라면 몰라도… 지금은 같은 오르카의 일원이잖아요?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_69.english: And… I also received a lot of help from Mr. Merlin.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_69.korean: 그리고… 멀린 씨에게 큰 도움도 받았고요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_71.english: Please let me know if you need any help.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_72.english: Believe it or not, I am the manager of Cafe Horizon.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_72.korean: 이래 봬도 저는 카페 호라이즌의 점장이니까요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_74.english: Do you think I am someone who can ask someone for help?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_74.korean: 너는 내가 누군가에게 도와 달라고 말할 수 있는 자라 생각하나?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_75.english: It’s not strange to ask a colleague for help.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_75.korean: 같은 동료에게 도움을 부탁하는 건 이상한 일이 아니니까요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_8.english: Rhode was just standing still... Why was she dragged here...
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_8.korean: 로데는 그냥 가만히 있었을 뿐인데… 왜 여기로 끌려온 건가요…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_81.english: As expected, Orca is a fun place.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_82.english: Then, I’d like you to give me some advice.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_82.korean: 그럼 한 가지 조언을 해 줬으면 좋겠어.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_84.english: As you know, this is just my personality.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_85.english: They said that if I acted just like usual, the customers would be scared and all run away.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_85.korean: 평소대로만 행동하면 손님들이 무서워서 다 도망갈 거라더군.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_86.english: Even though I know it, it’s not easy to treat them gently.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_86.korean: 알고는 있어도 부드럽게 접대하는 게 쉽지가 않아.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_87.english: I see... There might be some members who wouldn't care at all... but depending on the customer, that could be the case.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_87.korean: 그렇군요... 전혀 신경 안 쓸 대원들도 있겠지만… 손님에 따라선 그럴 수도 있겠네요.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_88.english: So, the manager of Cafe Horizon.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_89.english: Could you teach me 'how to entertain guests well'?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_89.korean: 나한테 ‘손님 접대 잘하는 방법’ 좀 전수해 주겠어?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_9.english: I'm telling you, Rhode isn't a maid.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_90.english: Hmm... I thought you could handle it gently enough...
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_90.korean: 으음… 저는 당신이 충분히 부드럽게 할 수 있을 거라고 생각했는데요…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_91.english: Huh? Me? How can you say that?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_92.english: Well… when I look at Meropé or… Rhode…
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_92.korean: 그야… 메로페 씨나… 로데 씨를 보면…

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_93.english: Why are those girls' names coming up here?
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_93.korean: 여기서 그 녀석들 이름이 왜 나와?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_95.english: Why did you decide to open a cafe?

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_96.english: I told Merlin a long time ago that I would do it with him.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_96.korean: 예전에 멀린에게 같이 해 주겠다고 말했거든.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_97.english: I didn't think I would actually end up doing it, though.
WakeUpPoseidon2ED_97.korean: 정말로 하게 될 줄은 몰랐지만 말이야.

WakeUpPoseidon2ED_99.english: Please think about it a little more.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_1.english: *Sob*... One iced Americano... What? An extra shot...? What? Regular ice...?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_1.korean: 후엥… 아이스 아메리카노 하나… 네? 샷 추가요…? 네? 얼음은 보통으로…?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_10.english: … And the menu for table number 4 hasn't come out yet. Is that okay?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_10.korean: …그리고 아직 4번 테이블 메뉴가 안 나왔는데 괜찮나?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_11.english: Oh, I'm sorry. There were more orders than expected, so it was delayed.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_11.korean: 아, 죄송해요. 예상보다 주문이 많아서 늦어졌어요.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_13.english: Hmm, that's fine. I'll make this, so you handle the other orders.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_13.korean: 음, 괜찮다. 이건 내가 만들 테니 너는 다른 주문을 처리해라.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_14.english: Thank you. I'll leave it to you!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_16.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah! It's a good flow!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_17.english: That's really good for the first day!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_18.english: Thank you so much for coming to help today.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_18.korean: 오늘 도와주러 와 줘서 정말 고마워.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_19.english: What do you mean? We owe you a debt too.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_19.korean: 뭘, 우리도 너희한테 신세 진 적 있잖아.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_2.english: Haa... uh, so, regarding the iced Americano order... Wh-what was it again?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_2.korean: 하으… 그, 그러니까 아이스 아메리카노 주문에… 머, 뭐였죠?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_20.english: We were the ones who asked to be called if needed.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_20.korean: 필요하면 불러 달라고 한 것도 우리고.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_21.english: I didn't expect to come this soon, though.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_21.korean: 이렇게 빨리 찾아오게 될 줄은 몰랐지만.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_22.english: Besides… I’m actually grateful that you even let me see some funny scenes~
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_22.korean: 게다가… 재미있는 장면까지 보게 해줘서 오히려 고마울 정도야~

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_23.english: Hahaha, this Merlin... he is a man of action!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_23.korean: 후후후, 이 멀린… 한다면 하는 인물이지요!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_24.english: I never thought it would actually work...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_25.english: To think that Lemonade Gamma is doing maid service… This is seriously a god-tier incident!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_25.korean: 저 레모네이드 감마가 메이드 접대를 하다니… 진짜 존나 대박 사건!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_26.english: I can't believe it even though I'm watching it.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_27.english: You're even doing better than I thought.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_28.english: Captain Gamma—no, since the Store Manager declared that he would do it, he said he would do it properly!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_28.korean: 감마 대장ㅡ 아니 점장님이 하겠다고 선언한 이상 제대로 한다고 하셨으니까요!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_29.english: I think you were the store manager when you guys helped out before.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_29.korean: 전에 너희가 도와줬을 땐 네가 점장이었던 것 같은데.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_30.english: Why isn't it you this time?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_31.english: Well, back then, Captain Gamma hadn't officially joined yet, and...
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_31.korean: 뭐, 그때는 감마 대장님이 정식 합류하기 전이기도 했고...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_32.english: Above all, if it's about putting Poseidon's name on the line, Captain Gamma is the right choice for the store manager!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_32.korean: 무엇보다 포세이돈의 이름 걸고 하는 거라면, 점장은 역시 감마 대장님이 맞지!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_33.english: Yeah, yeah. Anyway, you really have to acknowledge your love for the Captain.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_33.korean: 그래~ 그래. 하여간 네 그 대장님 사랑은 알아줘야 한다니까.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_34.english: Anyway... I saw it briefly earlier.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_35.english: A sign placed in front of the door…

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_38.english: The store manager insisted so strongly... I had no choice.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_38.korean: 점장님이 강력하게 주장하셔서… 어쩔 수 없었어.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_4.english: Ah! One shot, regular ice! Got it!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_4.korean: 아! 샷 추가, 얼음은 보통! 알겠어요!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_40.english: Come to think of it, Cafe Poseidon, which received approval for a new store, opened today, didn't it?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_40.korean: - 그러고 보니 신규 점포 허가를 내린 카페 포세이돈 오픈이 오늘이었지?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_41.english: It should be open by now, so shall we go take a look?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_41.korean: - 지금쯤이면 열었을 테니 한번 가 볼까?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_43.english: I was surprised when Gamma announced they were going to open a cafe, but I guess it's fair to say they've adapted well to Orca?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_43.korean: - 감마 쪽에서 카페를 하겠다고 선언했을 때는 놀랐지만, 오르카에 잘 적응했다고 보면 되려나?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_44.english: Anyway, I never thought the day would come when I would drink coffee brewed by Gamma.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_44.korean: - 그건 그렇고 감마가 내려 주는 커피를 마시는 날이 올 줄이야.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_45.english: I'm really looking forward to this!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_47.english: Commanders belonging to Orca are restricted from entering this store.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_47.korean: 《오르카 소속 사령관은 본 매장 출입이 제한됩니다.》

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_5.english: And here is the order for table number 3.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_53.english: - Me… did I do something wrong to Poseidon's kids?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_53.korean: - 나… 포세이돈 애들한테 뭐 잘못한 게 있었나?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_54.english: There weren't any problems until recently.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_54.korean: - 얼마 전까지만 해도 아무 문제 없었는데?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_56.english: Come to think of it, I don't think I've met and talked with Gamma that often...
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_56.korean: - 생각해보니 감마와는 그렇게 자주 만나서 얘기하지 않은 것 같은…

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_57.english: - Should I have spent a little more time with Gamma?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_57.korean: - 좀 더… 감마랑 시간을 보냈어야 했나?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_58.english: No, we can't necessarily conclude that is the reason...
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_58.korean: - 아니, 꼭 그게 이유라고 단정 지을 수는...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_6.english: I'll handle this side, so you take the orders to the kitchen and do the serving.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_6.korean: 이쪽은 내가 맡을 테니까, 너는 주방에 주문 전달하고 서빙해 줘.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_63.english: Don't stay here like this, get up, Rhode.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_64.english: We have to get ready from the morning again tomorrow, so let's hurry back to the accommodation.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_64.korean: 내일도 아침부터 준비해야 하니 어서 숙소로 돌아가요.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_65.english: … Merope, how long do we have to keep doing this?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_65.korean: …메로페 님, 저희 언제까지 이 일을 계속해야 하는 건가요?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_66.english: Hmm… if there aren’t any other missions, will we continue?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_66.korean: 음… 다른 임무가 없다면, 앞으로도 계속?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_68.english: If I had known this would happen, I wouldn't have said I was doing it just because I was lured by the cake...
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_68.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 케이크에 현혹돼서 한다고 말하지 않는 건데...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_7.english: Ah… yes! I understand! Leave it to me!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_71.english: Captain Gamma, you worked hard today!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_72.english: I saw you from a distance... but your hospitality seems perfect now.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_73.english: This Merlin has no regrets now that I have been able to witness Captain Gamma's maid hospitality.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_73.korean: 이 멀린, 감마 대장님의 메이드 접대를 볼 수 있었으니… 더는 여한이 없습니다.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_74.english: It's noisy. And it's still a long way off.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_77.english: They say Arthur came to the front of the store today... and then went back.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_77.korean: 오늘 아서가… 가게 앞까지 왔다가 돌아갔다고 해요.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_8.english: Here! Orders for tables 2 and 6 are ready!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_80.english: Since I've started, I said I would do it properly...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_81.english: I plan to show that guy a 'proper hospitality'.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_82.english: To the point where it wouldn't be inferior even to a dragon.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_83.english: Alright! In that case, I, Assistant Manager Merlin, will be your practice partner, Manager!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_83.korean: 좋아요! 그렇다면 이 부점장 멀린이, 점장님을 위해 연습 상대가 되어 드리겠습니다!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_84.english: Would you please treat me as if I were Arthur?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_85.english: I'll also teach you a secret weapon that 'works' on Arthur!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_86.english: Just trust me and follow me!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_88.english: In that case, I guess I'll have to keep up with you until late tonight.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_88.korean: 그렇다면 오늘 밤, 늦게까지 상대해 줘야겠어.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_89.english: Gasp... With Captain Gamma until late at night... just the two of us...?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_9.english: I will take it right now.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_91.english: I don't know what you're imagining, but be prepared.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_92.english: Even if you say you can't do it anymore... I will never let you go.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_92.korean: 더는 못하겠다고 해도… 절대 안 놔줄 거다.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_10.english: Do you happen to know Armand?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_13.english: If that is the case, you won't need to worry.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_14.english: There are no bioroids in Orca who dislike His Majesty.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_16.english: That would be a relief, but... then there must be another reason... I just have absolutely no idea...
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_16.korean: 그렇다면 다행이지만… 그럼 다른 이유가 있을 텐데… 도통 모르겠단 말이지…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_17.english: You don't have to worry so much; you will soon find out.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_17.korean: 그렇게 고민하지 않으셔도, 곧 아시게 될 겁니다.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_22.english: I heard about the cafe. Is it going well?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_22.korean: 카페 얘기는 들었어. 잘 돼 가고 있어?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_24.english: This is all… thanks to… the super genius… beautiful girl… *cough*… Lord Merlin…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_24.korean: 이게 다… 초 천재… 미소녀… 우읍… 멀린님… 덕분… 이지…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_25.english: Um... but you don't look well. Are you okay?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_25.korean: 어… 근데 상태가 안 좋아 보이는데, 괜찮아?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_26.english: It's okay... Lately... *cough*... I've been... pushing myself a bit...

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_27.english: Cafes are nice, but please don't overdo it.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_29.english: And… what came… was none other than…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_3.english: Your Majesty, your hand is frozen.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_30.english: Today… I’m planning to invite Arthur to Café Poseidon…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_30.korean: 오늘… 아서를 카페 포세이돈에... 초대하려고 해…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_33.english: Hahaha... Actually, it was Captain Gamma's idea to keep Arthur out of the way until now.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_33.korean: 후후후… 사실 지금까지 아서의 출입을 막은 건 감마 대장님의 의견이었어.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_35.english: Saying that it wasn't ready yet…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_36.english: I said I wanted to properly prepare and welcome Arthur, at least...
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_36.korean: 아서만큼은 제대로 준비해서 맞이하고 싶다고 했거든…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_37.english: And finally… I’m telling you… I’m ready…! Ugh…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_37.korean: 그리고 드디어… 그 준비가 됐단 말씀…! 우욱…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_38.english: Of course… you’ll come, right, Arthur?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_40.english: A short while later, having hurriedly finished my work, I headed to Cafe Poseidon.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_40.korean: - 잠시 후, 서둘러 업무를 끝낸 나는 카페 포세이돈으로 향했다.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_41.english: The sign that had been in front of the entrance until yesterday was gone.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_41.korean: - 출입문 앞에는 어제까지만 해도 놓여 있던 팻말이 사라져 있었다.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_42.korean: 카페 포세이돈에… 어서 와라. 주, 주인님…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_44.english: Then, I will guide you to your seat.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_45.english: Huh? Oh, yeah! I'll leave it to you.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_47.english: I'm sorry, but the menu is fixed for today. We do not accept personal orders.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_47.korean: 미안하지만, 오늘은 메뉴가 정해져 있다. 개인적인 주문은 받지 않는다.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_48.english: Really? Then I'll leave it to you.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_49.english: I'll bring it right away, so please wait just a moment. M-Master...
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_49.korean: 금방 가져올 테니 조금만 기다려라. 주, 주인님…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_5.english: No, you don't need to apologize.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_51.english: I've heard the word 'master' countless times, but this feels like a new experience.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_51.korean: - ‘주인님’이라는 말은 지금까지 수도 없이 들었지만, 이건 또 새로운 느낌이네.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_53.english: - It suits you much better than I thought… It’s cute… ?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_53.korean: - 생각했던 것보다 너무 잘 어울려… 귀엽잖아…?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_54.english: I'm sorry for making you wait.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_55.english: Hmph... H-here... Manager of Cafe Poseidon, Lemonade Gamma... This is a special menu made exclusively for you, Master.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_55.korean:
큭… 여, 여기… 카페 포세이돈 점장, 레모네이드 감마가…​
주인님만을 위해 만든 특별 메뉴다.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_56.english: A special menu made for me?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_58.english: You're wondering what makes it special...? Th-that is... the syrup drizzled over the shaved ice... is homemade by this Gamma.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_58.korean:
어디가 특별한 건지 궁금하다고…?
그, 그건… 빙수 위에 뿌려진 시럽이… 이 감마님의 수제라는 사실이다.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_60.english: Ugh! That doesn't matter right now! The important thing is that I, the manager of Cafe Poseidon, have specially prepared this menu for you, Master!
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_60.korean:
에잇! 지금 그런 건 아무래도 좋다!​
중요한 건, 카페 포세이돈의 점장인 내가 주인님을 위해 특별히 이 메뉴를 준비했다는 거다!​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_61.english: Damn it... Merlin... You actually think this works...? If it doesn't work, you'd better be prepared...
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_61.korean:
젠장… 멀린 녀석… 정말 이런 게 먹힌다고…?​
만약 소용없으면 각오하는 게 좋을 거야…​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_62.english: Ahaha, then I'll enjoy the meal.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_63.english: Ah, don't eat yet! There's still something left to do... They say this has to be included for it to be a true special menu...
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_63.korean:
앗, 아직 먹지 마라!​
해야 할 게 남아 있다… 이게 들어가야 진정한 특별 메뉴라는군…​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_64.english: … Hmph, listen up…! I won’t do this twice! This is for Master only, limited to one time only! If you laugh… you’re really going to die!
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_64.korean:
…큭, 잘 들어라…! 두 번은 안 한다!​
이건 주인님 전용 1회 한정이니까! 웃으면… 진짜로 뒤진다!​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_66.english: Ahem... It's delicious as it is, but I'll cast a spell to make it even more delicious~ Become delicious~ Moe moe~~~ Kyung♥
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_66.korean:
크흠… 지금도 맛있지만, 더 맛있어지는 주문을 해드릴게요~​
맛있어져라~ 모에 모에~~~ 뀽♥​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_68.english: … … Hey, how long are you going to keep staring at my face! That’s enough, so stop talking and eat the shaved ice, the shaved ice!
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_68.korean:
……언, 언제까지 내 얼굴을 보고 있을 거냐!​
이제 됐으니까 아무 말 말고 빙수를 먹어라, 빙수를!​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_69.english: Thanks for the order. I haven't even eaten it yet, but I can already tell it's delicious.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_69.korean:
주문 고마워.
먹지도 않았는데 벌써부터 맛있는 느낌이 들어.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_7.english: Are you curious about the newly opened Cafe Poseidon?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_7.korean: 새로 오픈한 카페 포세이돈이 신경 쓰이십니까?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_71.english: … How is it? Is it not too cold…? I was worried you might dislike things that are just sweet, so I gave it quite a try.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_71.korean:
…어때?​
너무 차갑진 않나…? 달기만 한 건 또 싫어하나 싶어서, 꽤 고민했는데.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_73.english: What's with that face? If you keep smiling blankly like that… it really feels like the spell worked.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_73.korean:
뭐야, 그 얼굴은.​
그렇게 멍하니 웃고 있으면… 진짜로 주문이 통했다는 느낌이 들잖아.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_75.english: This is the first time I've ever had such delicious shaved ice.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_75.korean: 이렇게 맛있는 빙수를 먹어 보는 건 처음이야.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_76.english: I-Is that so... Then that's a relief... After all, this is a menu I, the manager of Cafe Poseidon, put my all into making; I should at least hear the Master say it's delicious.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_76.korean:
그, 그런가… 그럼 다행이고…​
명색이 카페 포세이돈 점장이 전력으로 만든 메뉴인데, 주인님 입에서 ‘맛있다’라는 말 정도는 들어야지.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_77.english: Is it being added as a new menu item at Cafe Poseidon because it's this delicious?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_77.korean: 이렇게 맛있으니까 카페 포세이돈 신메뉴로 추가되는 거야?

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_78.english: That might be a bit of a shame... It wouldn't be a special menu just for me.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_78.korean: 그건 좀 아쉬울지도… 나만을 위한 특별 메뉴가 아니게 되잖아.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_79.english: You don't need to worry about that. I don't intend to put it on the menu. This is a special dish made exclusively for you, Master.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_79.korean:
그건 걱정하지 않아도 된다. 메뉴판엔 올리지 않을 작정이다.​
이건 주인님만을 위한 특별 메뉴니까.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_80.english: If you want to eat it again… stare intently at my face just like you did. If you keep looking at me, making this shaved ice is no big deal.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_80.korean:
만약 또 먹고 싶다면… 방금처럼 내 얼굴을 빤히 보고 있어라.​
날 계속 바라봐 준다면, 이런 빙수 만드는 건 일도 아니지.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_81.english: So for now… don't say a word, just take another spoonful. That is the best way to repay the manager of Cafe Poseidon.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_81.korean:
그러니까 지금은… 아무 말 말고, 한 숟갈 더 떠 먹어라.​
그게 카페 포세이돈 점장을 위한 최고의 답례다.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_82.english: …And speaking of which, since I’ve gone out of my way to do this… shouldn’t the manager at least give me something in return? Can you stay a little longer after Cafe Poseidon closes?
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_82.korean:
…그리고 말인데, 내가 이렇게까지 해줬으면… 점장 쪽에서도 답례 정도는 바랄 수 있지 않겠나?​
카페 포세이돈 영업이 끝난 뒤에… 조금 더 남아 있을 수 있겠어?​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_83.english: Yeah, I'll repay you with anything I can.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_83.korean: 응, 내가 할 수 있는 거라면 뭐든지 답례할게.

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_84.english: Once all the customers have gone and the shop closes… it will no longer be a café, but a battlefield where only you and I can run rampant. As for what orders you place at that time… do as you please, Master. I will take them all.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_84.korean:
손님이 전부 돌아가고 가게 문을 닫으면… 그땐 카페가 아니라, 주인님과 나만 활개 할 수 있는 전장이 되니까.​
그 시간에 무슨 주문을 넣을 지는… 주인님 마음대로 해라. 이 몸이 전부 받아주마.​

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_85.english: That evening, at Cafe Poseidon, which had closed for the day
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_85.korean: - 그날 저녁, 영업을 종료한 카페 포세이돈에서는

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_86.english: - A special order made for only one person that cannot be served to other customers…
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_86.korean: - 다른 손님들에게는 내놓을 수 없는, 오직 한 사람만을 위한 특별한 주문이…

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_88.english: I got hit! It looks like they're shooting from the northern ridge!

WakeUpPoseidon4ED_9.english: No matter how much I think about it, I don't understand why I'm restricted from entering.
WakeUpPoseidon4ED_9.korean: 아무리 생각해도 내가 왜 출입 제한인지 모르겠어.
